title: Mossy Moss Carpets!
body:
When downloaded, this texture pack makes your Moss Carpets more mossy! With a custom block model and textures that give an almost seamless ovelay, you can easily add natural flavor to your minecraft world!
This texture pack also works well with my [Snowier Snow Layers!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/snowier-snow-layers!) If you haven't seen that one yet, be sure to go check it out!

Thanks for stopping by and I hope you enjoy!

Also, Optifine is **not** required!


<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>
  
- Feel free to use this in videos and such, just give me a shoutout or link back to this post in the description.
- You may include it in mod packs or use it on servers, just give credit when appropriate.
- Don't redistribute without my permission.
- I may adjust these terms and conditions in time as needed.


</details>
